bracu_official.title: UG "Wishlist" Event Schedule, Fall 2026
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has announced the "Wishlist" event schedule for undergraduate students for Fall 2026.

bracu_official.title: ‘Eco-Friendly Cafeteria’ initiative encourages sustainable choices at BRAC University
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has launched an 'Eco-Friendly Cafeteria' initiative to promote sustainable choices among its students and staff.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law graduate awarded prestigious joint doctoral scholarship between the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney
bracu_official.summary: A BRAC University law graduate has received a prestigious joint doctoral scholarship from the University of Glasgow and the University of Sydney.

bracu_official.title: BRAC University law alumni association’s new executive committee takes charge for 2026–2028 term
bracu_official.summary: The new executive committee for the BRAC University law alumni association has officially taken charge for the 2026–2028 term.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2
bracu_official.summary: A notice has been issued regarding the award B-113, related to ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-2.

bracu_official.title: Notice of Award – B-113, ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-1
bracu_official.summary: A notice has been issued regarding the award B-113, related to ICSETEP/RGD/BRAC/GD-1.

bracu_official.title: Recruitment Notice
bracu_official.summary: BRAC University has published a recruitment notice.
